description: Asclepiadaceae (now often included in Apocynaceae) contains many succulent genera native to Africa, Arabia and Asia. Stapeliads (Stapelia, Huernia, Orbea, Caralluma) are leafless stem succulents bearing intricate, often carrion-scented flowers. Ceropegia (string-of-hearts, lantern flowers) and Dischidia are also included.
